## Publications

### Manuscripts
1. **Yanping Weng**, Yu Ma, Li Jin, Yi Wang,Yu An. *Transcriptomic subtypes and regulatory patterns of refractory epilepsy revealed by network-based analysis.*  
   Submitted to *Epilepsia*, currently under review.

### Theses
- **Master’s Thesis (2024):** *Integrative transcriptomic analysis of brain lesions in refractory epilepsy using network-based machine learning.*  
  Fudan University, Human Phenome Institute.

### Software & Workflows
- **Bioinformatics Pipelines (GitHub):** Developed reproducible analysis workflows in WDL/Docker for cfDNA methylation, cfRNA diagnostics, and single-cell transcriptomics.  
  [View on GitHub](https://github.com/yan-ww)
